series_metadata.series_description: Working Coastal Design Manual (CDM) records to include draft copies used for editing, revised research & resource data, and miscellaneous materials used during information collection to create draft edition of the manual. The manual demonstrates how structures along the shore of Lake Erie are designed and how coastal engineering principles are best applied to achieve a balance between landowners’ needs for erosion control and lake access and the need to protect our lake’s natural resources.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: final draft is completed and approved. ; Electronic: final draft is completed and approved
